ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Patient's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Patient's last name */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Patient's gender (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Patient's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Patient's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Patient's email address */,
  "date_of_registration" TEXT /* Date of patient's registration in the system */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient's last visit */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Detailed medical history (e.g., previous conditions, surgeries) */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  "primary_physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary physician */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number for the insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who took the test */,
  "pregnancies" INTEGER /* Number of pregnancies */,
  "glucose" REAL /* Glucose level */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure */,
  "skin_thickness" INTEGER /* Skin thickness */,
  "insulin" REAL /* Insulin level */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "diabetes_pedigree_function" REAL /* Diabetes pedigree function */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "outcome" INTEGER /* Outcome (1 for diabetes, 0 for no diabetes) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of medical test (e.g., blood test, urine test) */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the test results */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who ordered the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_tests_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnosis" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis_code" TEXT /* Diagnosis code */,
  "diagnosis_description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnosis */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who made the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_source" TEXT /* Source of the diagnosis (e.g., lab test, physical exam) */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the diagnosis */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the follow-up appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnosis_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physicians" (
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physician */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Physician's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Physician's last name */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Physician's specialty */,
  "email" TEXT /* Physician's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Physician's phone number */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the physician */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital or clinic where the physician works */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the physician works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("physician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the plan is created */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who created the plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., Active, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "plan_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment plan (e.g., medication, lifestyle changes) */,
  "plan_details" TEXT /* Detailed plan description */,
  "follow_up_plan" TEXT /* Description of the follow-up plan */,
  "next_appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next appointment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of medication intake */,
  "form" TEXT /* Form of the medication (e.g., tablet, injection) */,
  "strength" TEXT /* Strength of the medication */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* List of known side effects */,
  "contraindications" TEXT /* Conditions or factors that make the medication unsuitable */,
  "storage_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for storing the medication */,
  "prescription_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of refills allowed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medications" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the medication is prescribed */,
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medication prescribed */,
  "physician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the physician who prescribed the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was prescribed */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for taking the medication */,
  "refill_date" TEXT /* Date when the next refill is due */,
  "refill_count" INTEGER /* Number of refills remaining */,
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy where the medication was dispensed */,
  "dispensing_date" TEXT /* Date the medication was dispensed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_physician_id FOREIGN KEY ("physician_id") REFERENCES physicians ("physician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_medication_id FOREIGN KEY ("medication_id") REFERENCES medications ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., Insert, Update, Delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., old and new values) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who performed the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., data entry, data modification, data deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
